name: map
title: Map
description: MapLibre GL map family ported from mapcn (React) to vanilla JS: Map container (Carto light/dark basemaps with live theme tracking, blank tile-less mode, globe projection), MapMarker with popup/tooltip/label slots, MapControls (zoom / compass / locate / fullscreen), and standalone MapPopup annotations pinned to coordinates. First runtime npm dep in the registry: maplibre-gl (WebGL cannot be static output). The consumer owns the container height — h-full against an unsized parent renders a 0px map.
